title: HOGOKIDS 3 in 1 Pink Bunny Building Set with Flowers, Animal Figure with 3 Building Options - Flamingo, Bunny, or Dolphin, 558PCS Creative Easter Birthday Gift, Learning Toy for Kids Girls Boys Age 6+
features: 3 IN 1 PINK ANIMAL TOY FOR KIDS - HOGOKIDS 3 in 1 pink cute animal figures building set lets kids build and rebuild 3 different animal figures with the same bricks: pink flamingo, rabbit and dophine. Kids are free to choose their favorite critters to build and role-play stories with these lively charaters (Note that models cannot be built simultaneously)

POSABLE ANIMAL FIGURES - All 3 animals are designed with posable, flexible joints. The pink rabbit can move its its head, ears, forelegs and hind legs, transforming from upright to lying down. The pink flamingo can move its head and neck and the dolphin can raise its tail. This thoughtful design adds more interactivity to the toy, so kids can fully enjoy imaginative play with the cute flamingo building block

ACCESSORIES FOR PLAY & DISPLAY - The cute bunny toy has a huge carrot and the dolphin toy has a playing ring and a small blue ball. These accessories, along with the movable parts, greatly enrich the playability of this animals toy set and can keep children immersed and entertained for hours. Besides, each critter comes with a colorful flower bush, making this set a great display in your bedroom or on a shelf

LEARNING TOY - This animals figure building toy is made of safe premium materials, perfect for kids aged 6+. This 3 in 1 building block is dedicated to capturing and presenting the real appearance of these animals in vibrant colors. It allows children learn to recognize animals, enhance their hands-on ability and logical thinking ability while enjoying the time of build and rebuild, making it fun and educational

GREAT GIFT FOR KIDS - HOGOKIDS 3 in 1 rabbit building block set can be an immersive and fun building experience for kids, perfect as a treat for boys and girls from 6-12+. Whether it's a birthday, Christmas, Easter, or any other special holiday, the cute pink animal figure toy can make a great gift choice for animal-loving kids and adults
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Animal-loving kids can enjoy fun time with a Pink Flamingo building set, then rebuild it into a Pink Bunny toy or Pink Dolphin toy. Play & Display HOGOKIDS pink animal building toy provides each animal rich accessories and colorful flower bush, making this set a great display in your bedroom or on a shelf. Pick Your Favorite Critters Which one catches your eyes most? Is it the elegant flamingo bending down to drink, the playful dolphin splashing in the sea, or the bunny nibbling on a carrot? Choose your favorite animal to build and role-play stories with these lively charaters！ Previous page Bunny with Adjustable Posture This cute pink bunny can change its pose from lying down to standing upright! With movable ears, legs, and head, it’s full of personality and fun interaction. Flamingo with Movable Neck From gracefully looking up to bending low to sip water, the pink flamingo features a posable neck for dynamic and lifelike movement in play and display. Dolphin with Swinging Tail The playful dolphin has movable joints that allow it to flip its tail and twist its body, making it look like it’s leaping through waves—so lively and fun!
